# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Get the backend actually running after deploy, not just building successfully.

## Success Criteria

- Backend startup is compatible with Railway runtime expectations.
- Remaining deployment troubleshooting is narrowed to concrete runtime config/log evidence.

## UX Notes

- None; deployment/runtime task.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Without the exact Railway runtime log, only the most probable runtime fixes can be applied proactively.
